objections.title: unclamped_score declared advisory-non-mandatory but AC6 and M8 assert on it
objections.claim: BA's JSONL Entry Schema advisory section (ticket lines 165-168) marks unclamped_score as 'NOT verified by ACs, NOT mandatory JSONL' — advisory only. But AC6 THEN clause requires 'last["unclamped_score"] == 101' and M8 requires same assertion.
objections.problem: A dev who follows the schema advisory will not emit unclamped_score in the JSONL. The AC6 test assertion will raise a KeyError and fail. Advisory text and test requirement are mutually contradictory.
objections.required_fix: Option B (recommended): Promote unclamped_score to mandatory 9th schema field; remove from advisory list; update M1 to explicitly rename uncapped_delta → unclamped_score. Option A (alternative): Change AC6 and M8 to assert prev_score + delta == 101 without requiring the named field.

codex_consult.findings_incorporated: Finding 1 (FINAL-1 blocking). Findings 2-6 classified advisory or out_of_scope.

summary: 7 prior objections fully resolved; 1 new blocking spec defect FINAL-1: unclamped_score advisory/non-mandatory text contradicts AC6 and M8 test assertions — dev cannot satisfy both
